{{Short description|Men's association football team}}
{{About|the men's team|the women's team|Dominica women's national football team}}
{{Use dmy dates|date=June 2021}}
{{More citations needed|date=June 2021}}
{{Infobox national football team
| Name                  = Dominica
| Badge                 = 
| Badge_size            = 200px
| Nickname              =
| Association           = [[Dominica Football Association]] (DFA)
| Sub-confederation     = [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] (Caribbean)
| Confederation         = [[CONCACAF]] (North America)
| Coach                 = [[Kurt Herd]]
| Captain               = [[Glenson Prince]]
| Most caps             = [[Glenson Prince]] (72)
| Top scorer            = [[Julian Wade]] (20)
| Home Stadium          = [[DFA Technical Center Stadium]]<br>[[Windsor Park (Dominica)|Windsor Park]]
| FIFA Trigramme        = DMA
| FIFA Rank             = {{FIFA World Rankings|DMA}}
| FIFA max              = 128
| FIFA max date         = November 2010, February 2011
| FIFA min              = 198
| FIFA min date         = July 2009
| Elo Rank              = {{World Football Elo Ratings|Dominica}}
| Elo max               = 59
| Elo max date          = 9 January 1938
| Elo min               = 198
| Elo min date          = 29 March 2015
| pattern_la1           = _dma21h
| pattern_b1            = _dma21h
| pattern_ra1           = _dma21h
| pattern_sh1           = _dma21h
| pattern_so1           = _dma21h
| leftarm1              = FFEE00
| body1                 = 1cb34b
| rightarm1             = FFEE00
| shorts1               = 000000
| socks1                = 1cb34b
| pattern_la2           = 
| pattern_b2            = _dma21a
| pattern_ra2           = 
| leftarm2              = FFFFFF
| body2                 =FFFFFF
| rightarm2             =FFFFFF
| shorts2               = FFFFFF
| socks2                = FFFFFF
| First game            = {{fb|DMA|1955}} 1–0 {{fb-rt|MTQ|snake}}<br>([[Dominica]]; 1932)<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.rsssf.org/tablesd/domi-intres.html |title=Dominica&nbsp;– List of International matches |author=Courtney, Barrie |website=[[RSSSF]] |access-date=18 November 2010 |archive-date=9 February 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230209141029/https://www.rsssf.org/tablesd/domi-intres.html |url-status=live }}</ref>
| Largest win           = {{nowrap|{{fb|DMA}} 10–0 {{fb-rt|BVI}}<br>([[San Cristóbal, Dominican Republic]]; October 15, 2010)}}
| Largest loss          = {{fb|MEX}} 10–0 {{fb-rt|DMA}}<br>([[San Antonio]], [[United States]]; June 19, 2004)
| World cup apps        = 
| World cup first       = 
| World cup best        = 
| Regional name         = 
| Regional cup apps     = 
| Regional cup first    = 
| Regional cup best     = 
}}

The '''Dominica national football team''' represents [[Dominica]] in men's international [[Association football|football]], which is governed by the [[Dominica Football Association]] founded in 1970. It has been an affiliate member of [[FIFA]] since 1994, an associate member of [[CONCACAF]] since 1990 and becoming a full member in 1994. Regionally, it is an affiliate member of [[Caribbean Football Union|CFU]] in the Caribbean Zone.

Dominica has never participated in the [[FIFA World Cup]] and the [[CONCACAF Gold Cup]], but has participated twice in League B and twice in League C of the [[CONCACAF Nations League]].

==History==
===Beginnings===
Dominica played its first international match in 1932, against [[Martinique national football team|Martinique]], a match that ended in a 1–0 victory. In the 1940s they participated in the 1948 Coupe des Caraibes, losing in the preliminaries against [[Martinique national football team|Martinique]] 5–0 but qualified due to [[Trinidad and Tobago national football team|Trinidad and Tobago]]'s withdrawal.<ref>{{cite web |last1=Veroeveren |first1=Piet |title=Coupe des Caraibes 1948 |url=https://www.rsssf.org/tablesc/caraibes48.html |website=RSSSF |access-date=2 February 2023 |archive-date=9 February 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230209130032/https://rsssf.org/tablesc/caraibes48.html |url-status=live }}</ref> In the competition proper, Dominica again faced Martinique, losing 6–0 and being eliminated.

In the 1960s and 1970s, Dominica played in several editions of the [[Windward Islands Tournament]], winning the competition in 1971 with two 3–0 victories over [[Saint Vincent and the Grenadines national football team|Saint Vincent]] and [[Grenada national football team|Grenada]], and a 2–2 draw against [[Saint Lucia national football team|Saint Lucia]]. In the 1980s, Dominica regularly participated in the qualifying rounds of the [[CFU Championship]], although they were unable to make it into the tournament proper.

===1990s===

After the creation of the [[Caribbean Cup]] in 1989, Dominica was only able to qualify for the group stage in the [[1994 Caribbean Cup|1994 edition]]. They could not get past the first phase, after losing to the hosts [[Trinidad and Tobago national football team|Trinidad and Tobago]] 5–0 and [[Guadeloupe national football team|Guadeloupe]] 4–0. They were only able to draw 1–1 with [[Barbados national football team|Barbados]]. They next qualified for the [[1998 Caribbean Cup]], being eliminated again in the first round, this time with three defeats against [[Martinique national football team|Martinique]] 5–1, [[Antigua and Barbuda national football team|Antigua and Barbuda]] 2–1 and [[Trinidad and Tobago national football team|Trinidad and Tobago]] 8–0. Dominica has not managed to return to the final phase of the Caribbean Cup since.

Dominica participated in World Cup qualification for the first time in the [[1998 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|1998 qualifiers]] beating [[Antigua and Barbuda national football team|Antigua and Barbuda]] in the first round (3–3 in [[Roseau]] and 1–3 in [[St. John's, Antigua and Barbuda|St. John's]]) before losing in the second phase to [[Barbados national football team|Barbados]] (1–0 in both [[Roseau]] and [[Bridgetown]]).

===2000–present===

In the [[2002 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2002 qualifiers]], the ''Pericos'' succumbed to [[Haiti national football team|Haiti]] 7–1 on aggregate, and in the [[2006 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2006 qualifiers]], after beating [[Bahamas national football team|the Bahamas]] with an aggregate result of 4–2, the Dominicans faced the Mexican team that crushed them 10–0 in the first leg, then 8–0 at [[Aguascalientes City|Aguascalientes]]. The decade would end with an elimination at the hands of [[Barbados national football team|Barbados]], just like in 1996, this time as part of the [[2010 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2010 qualifiers]] (1–1 in [[Roseau]] and 0–1 in [[Bridgetown]]).

On 15 October 2010, Dominica achieved the greatest victory in its history, beating the [[British Virgin Islands national football team|British Virgin Islands]] 10–0, with 5 goals from striker [[Kurlson Benjamin]] - in the first qualifying round of the [[2010 Caribbean Cup]]. The following year, in the [[2014 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2014 World Cup qualifiers]], Dominica was drawn against [[Panama national football team|Panama]] and [[Nicaragua national football team|Nicaragua]]. They lost all four of their games, failing to score a goal and conceding 11. They were eliminated from [[2018 FIFA World Cup qualification (CONCACAF)|2018 World Cup qualification]] by [[Canada men's national soccer team|Canada]], who beat them 6–0 over two legs.

==Results and fixtures==
{{main|Dominica national football team results}}
The following is a list of match results in the last 12 months, as well as any future matches that have been scheduled.

{{legend2|#CCFFCC|Win|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFCC|Draw|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFCCCC|Loss|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}
{{legend2|#FFFFFF|Fixture|border=1px solid #AAAAAA}}

===2025===
{{football box collapsible
|round      = [[2025-26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 12 November
|time       = {{UTZ|16:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|DMA}}
|score      = 1–2
|team2      = {{fb|MAF}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2025-11-12/dominica-vs-saint-martin/3936734 
|goals1     =
*[[Troy Jules|Jules]] {{goal|47}}
|goals2     =
*[[Yannick Bellechasse|Bellechasse]] {{goal|79||90+1|pen.}}
|location   = [[Basseterre]], [[Saint Kitts and Nevis]]
|stadium    = [[SKNFA Technical Center]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Randy Encarnación ([[Dominican Football Federation|Dominican Republic]])
|result     = L
}}
{{football box collapsible
|round      = [[2025-26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 15 November
|time       = {{UTZ|16:00|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|DMA}}
|score      = 2–3
|team2      = {{fb|SMA}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2025-11-15/dominica-vs-sint-maarten/3936742
|goals1     =
*[[Travist Joseph|Joseph]] {{Goal|43||71}}
|goals2     =
*[[Len Bleeker|Bleeker]] {{goal|22}}
*[[Mitchell de Nooijer|de Nooijer]] {{goal|66}}
*[[Chovanie Amatkarijo|Amatkarijo]] {{goal|75|pen.}}
|location   = [[Basseterre]], [[Saint Kitts and Nevis]]
|stadium    = [[SKNFA Technical Center]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = 
|result     = L
}}

===2026===
{{football box collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 27 March
|time       = {{UTZ|16:30|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|GUY}}
|score      = 2–0
|team2      = {{fb|DMA}}
|report     = https://www.concacaf.com/concacaf-series/news/amatkarijo-de-rosario-score-braces-in-concacaf-series/
|goals1     = *[[Osaze De Rosario|De Rosario]] {{goal|28||31}}
|goals2     =
|location   = [[Santiago de los Caballeros]], Dominican Republic 
|stadium    = [[Estadio Cibao FC]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = [[Patrick Senecharles]] ([[Haitian Football Federation|Haiti]])
|result     = L
}}
{{football box collapsible
|round      = [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]]
|date       = 30 March
|time       = {{UTZ|19:30|-4}}
|team1      = {{fb-rt|DMA}}
|score      = 0–0
|team2      = {{fb|SXM}}
|report     = https://globalsportsarchive.com/en/soccer/match/2026-03-31/dominica-vs-sint-maarten/4095375
|goals1     = 
|goals2     =
|location   = [[Santiago de los Caballeros]], Dominican Republic 
|stadium    = [[Estadio Cibao FC]]
|attendance = 
|referee    = Adrian Lage ([[Football Association of Cuba|Cuba]])
|result     = D
}}

==Coaching history==
{{div col|colwidth=22em}}
*{{flagicon|DMA}} [[Clifford Celaire]] (1996)
*{{flagicon|GER}} [[Helmut Kosmehl]] (2000)
*{{flagicon|DMA}} Don Leogal (2004)
*{{flagicon|DMA}} [[Clifford Celaire]] (2005–2006)
*{{flagicon|DMA}} Christopher Ericson (2008–2009)
*{{flagicon|DMA}} [[Kurt Hector]] (2009–2013)<ref name="Hectordeath">Hector was reported to have been killed in a traffic accident on 19 April 2013. No new coach has yet been appointed.[http://bostonherald.com/sports/revolution_soccer/soccer/2013/04/dominica_football_coach_player_die_in_crash Dominica football coach, player die in crash | Boston Herald] {{Webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140903073326/http://bostonherald.com/sports/revolution_soccer/soccer/2013/04/dominica_football_coach_player_die_in_crash |date=3 September 2014 }}</ref>
*{{flagicon|DMA}} Ronnie Gustave (2013–2014)
*{{flagicon|DMA}} [[Shane Marshall (football manager)|Shane Marshall]] (2014–2017)
*{{flagicon|TRI}} [[Rajesh Latchoo]] (2017–2022)
*{{flagicon|DMA}} [[Colin Bernard]] (2022–2023)
*{{flagicon|DMA}} [[Ellington Sabin]] (2022–2025)
*{{flagicon|SCO}} [[Kurt Herd]] (interim) (2026–present)
{{div col end}}

==Players==

===Current squad===
The following players were called up for the [[2025–26 CONCACAF Series]] matches against [[Guyana national football team|Guyana]] and [[Sint Maarten national football team|Sint Maarten]] on 27 and 30 March 2026.<ref>{{cite web |title=Here is the 18 man squad to represent the Senior Men's National Football Team 🇩🇲  for the upcoming Concacaf Series matches in the Dominican Republic. |url=https://www.facebook.com/share/p/19HncLextQ/ |website=Facebook |publisher=Dominica Football Association |access-date=10 July 2026 |date=26 March 2026}}</ref>

''Caps and goals correct as of 31 March 2026, after the match against [[Sint Maarten national football team|Sint Maarten]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Donté Newton]]|age={{bda|1999|2|17|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Harlem United FC|Harlem United]]|clubnat=DMA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Dwight Eloi]]|age={{bda|2008|11|26|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Bath Estate FC|Bath Estate]]|clubnat=DMA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Briel Thomas]]|age={{bda|1994|11|25|df=y}}|caps=56|goals=8|club=[[Dublanc FC|Dublanc]]|clubnat=DMA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Javid George]]|age={{bda|1998|6|14|df=y}}|caps=36|goals=3|club=[[Harbour View FC|Harbour View]]|clubnat=JAM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Eustace Marshall]]|age={{bda|1997|2|14|df=y}}|caps=19|goals=1|club=[[Bath Estate FC|Bath Estate]]|clubnat=DMA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Marcus Bredas]]|age={{bda|2003|11|29|df=y}}|caps=15|goals=0|club=[[Pointe Michel FC|Point Michel]]|clubnat=DMA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Savio Anselm]]|age={{bda|2002|9|21|df=y}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[Dublanc FC|Dublanc]]|clubnat=DMA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Nick Anthony]]|age={{birth date and age|1998|01|07|df=yes}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[Mahaut Soca Strikers FC|Mahaut Soca Strikers]]|clubnat=DMA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Titus Sandy Jr]]|age={{bda|2002|1|19|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Orlando City B]]|clubnat=USA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Audel Laville]]|age={{bda|2002|9|14|df=y}}|caps=31|goals=11|club=[[Dublanc FC|Dublanc]]|clubnat=DMA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Jervanie Xavier]]|age={{bda|2000|8|18|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Dublanc FC|Dublanc]]|clubnat=DMA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Dhamario Challenger]]|age={{bda|2006|5|14|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[South East FC|South East]]|clubnat=DMA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Lyan Edwards]]|age={{birth date and age|2005|12|08|df=yes}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[WE United FC|WE United]]|clubnat=DMA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Nicholas Harve]]|age={{birth date and age|2007|1|15|df=yes}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[York Lions]]|clubnat=CAN}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Jahlil Alexander]]|age=|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[WE United FC|WE United]]|clubnat=DMA}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Troy Jules]]|age={{bda|2000|6|26|df=y}}|caps=14|goals=5|club=[[Atlético Vega Real]]|clubnat=DOM}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Antawn Larocque]]|age={{bda|2006|7|9|df=y}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Portsmouth Bombers FC|Portsmouth Bombers]]|clubnat=DMA}}
{{nat fs g player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Clemson Isaac]]|age=|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[Middleham United FC|Middleham United]]|clubnat=DMA}}
{{nat fs end}}

===Recent call-ups===
The following players have been called up for the team within the last twelve months.
{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Jerome Burkard]]|age={{bda|2002|6|14|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Dublanc FC|Dublanc]]|clubnat=DMA|latest=v. {{fb|SXM}}, 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Glenson Prince]]|age={{bda|1987|9|17|df=y}}|caps=79|goals=0|club=[[Dublanc FC|Dublanc]]|clubnat=DMA|latest=v. {{fb|DOM}}, 10 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Mosiah Bonney]]|age={{birth date and age|2004|10|26|df=yes}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Texas A&M–Victoria Jaguars|UH Victoria Jaguars]]|clubnat=DMA|latest=v. {{fb|SXM}}, 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Jaylan Jno Ville]]|age={{birth date and age|2006|04|11|df=yes}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[Portsmouth Bombers FC|Portsmouth Bombers]]|clubnat=DMA|latest=v. {{fb|SXM}}, 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Gylles Mitchel]]|age={{birth date and age|1997|12|16|df=yes}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Baton Rouge Capitals]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|SXM}}, 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Donte Warrington]]|age={{bda|2004|10|18|df=y}}|caps=10|goals=0|club=[[Pointe Michel FC|Point Michel]]|clubnat=DMA|latest=v. {{fb|SXM}}, 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Malachai Bonney]]|age={{bda|2006|9|11|df=y}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[State Fair Community College|State Fair CC Roadrunners]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|SXM}}, 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Fitz Jolly]]|age={{bda|1999|3|16|df=y}}|caps=14|goals=0|club=[[Club Nacional Tampa Bay]]|clubnat=USA|latest=v. {{fb|DOM}}, 10 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Keeyan Thomas]]|age={{bda|2005|11|3|df=y}}|caps=14|goals=0|club=[[Portsmouth Bombers FC|Portsmouth Bombers]]|clubnat=DMA|latest=v. {{fb|DOM}}, 10 June 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Cobin Paul]]|age={{bda|2000|8|14|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Portsmouth Bombers FC|Portsmouth Bombers]]|clubnat=DMA|latest=v. {{fb|DOM}}, 10 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Travist Joseph]]|age={{bda|1994|05|23|df=y}}|caps=45|goals=5|club=[[Dublanc FC|Dublanc]]|clubnat=DMA|latest=v. {{fb|SXM}}, 15 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Reon Cuffy]]|age={{bda|1999|1|17|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[East Central FC|East Central]]|clubnat=DMA|latest=v. {{fb|DOM}}, 10 June 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
* {{small|INJ}} = Withdrew due to injury
{{nat fs end}}

==Records==
{{Updated|12 July 2026}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Dominica |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/53/Dominica.html |website=National Football Teams |access-date=9 August 2022 |archive-date=21 April 2023 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230421135832/https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/53/2023/Dominica.html |url-status=live }}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Dominica.''

===Most appearances===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Goals
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Glenson Prince]]'''
|79
|0
|2005–present
|-
|2
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Briel Thomas]]'''
|56
|8
|2013–present
|-
|3
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Chad Bertrand]]'''
|53
|6
|2010–present
|-
|4
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Julian Wade]]'''
|47
|16
|2010–present
|-
|5
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Travist Joseph]]'''
|45
|5
|2015–present
|-
|6
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Malcolm Joseph]]
|39
|1
|2011–2022
|-
|7
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Javid George]]'''
|36
|3
|2018–present
|-
|8
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Erskim Williams]]'''
|32
|0
|2013–present
|-
|9
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Audel Laville]]'''
|31
|11
|2018–present
|-
|10
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Sidney Lockhart]]
|28
|0
|2014–2022
|-
|}

===Top goalscorers===

{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align:center;"
|-
!width=30px|Rank
! style="width:150px;"|Player
!width=50px|Goals
!width=50px|Caps
!width=50px|Ratio
! style="width:100px;"|Career
|-
|1
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Julian Wade]]'''
|16
|47
|{{#expr:16/47 round 2}}
|2010–present
|-
|2
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Kurlson Benjamin]]
|14
|22
|{{#expr:14/22 round 2}}
|2008–2018
|-
|3
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Audel Laville]]'''
|11
|31
|{{#expr:11/31 round 2}}
|2018–present
|-
|4
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Briel Thomas]]'''
|8
|62
|{{#expr:8/62 round 2}}
|2013–present
|-
|rowspan=2|5
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Kelly Peters]]
|7
|14
|{{#expr:7/14 round 2}}
|1999–2011
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Chad Bertrand]]'''
|7
|58
|{{#expr:7/58 round 2}}
|2010–present
|-
|rowspan=4|7
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Vincent Casimir]]
|5
|10
|{{#expr:5/10 round 2}}
|2000–2004
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Troy Jules]]'''
|5
|14
|{{#expr:5/14 round 2}}
|2023–present
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|[[Mitchell Joseph]]
|5
|21
|{{#expr:5/21 round 2}}
|2005–2015
|-
|style="text-align: left;"|'''[[Travist Joseph]]'''
|5
|45
|{{#expr:5/45 round 2}}
|2010–present
|-
|}

==Competition records==

===FIFA World Cup===
[[File:Richard Pacquette.png|thumb|[[Richard Pacquette]] played for the national football team of Dominica]]

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
!colspan=9|[[FIFA World Cup]]
!rowspan=39|
!colspan=6|[[FIFA World Cup qualification|Qualification]]
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}*
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|[[1930 FIFA World Cup|1930]] to [[1978 FIFA World Cup|1978]]
|colspan=8|''Part of {{flag|United Kingdom}}''
|colspan=6|''Part of {{flag|United Kingdom}}''
|-
|[[1982 FIFA World Cup|1982]] to [[1994 FIFA World Cup|1994]]
|colspan=8| ''Not a FIFA member''
|colspan=6| ''Not a FIFA member''
|-
|{{flagicon|France|1974}} [[1998 FIFA World Cup|1998]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=8| ''Did not qualify''
| 4
| 1
| 1
| 2
| 6
| 6
|-
| {{flagicon|South Korea}} {{flagicon|Japan}} [[2002 FIFA World Cup|2002]]
| 2
| 0
| 0
| 2
| 1
| 7
|-
| {{flagicon|Germany}} [[2006 FIFA World Cup|2006]]
| 4
| 1
| 1
| 2
| 4
| 20
|-
| {{flagicon|South Africa}} [[2010 FIFA World Cup|2010]]
| 2
| 0
| 1
| 1
| 1
| 2
|-
| {{flagicon|Brazil}} [[2014 FIFA World Cup|2014]]
| 4
| 0
| 0
| 4
| 0
| 11
|-
| {{flagicon|Russia}} [[2018 FIFA World Cup|2018]]
| 4
| 1
| 1
| 2
| 3
| 8
|-
| {{flagicon|Qatar}} [[2022 FIFA World Cup|2022]]
| 4
| 1
| 1
| 2
| 5
| 4
|-
| {{flagicon|Canada}} {{flagicon|Mexico}} {{flagicon|United States}} [[2026 FIFA World Cup|2026]]
| 4
| 1
| 0
| 3
| 5
| 14
|-
|{{flagicon|Morocco}} {{flagicon|Portugal}} {{flagicon|Spain}} [[2030 FIFA World Cup|2030]]
|colspan=8 rowspan=2|''To be determined''
|colspan=6 rowspan=2|''Qualification yet to start''
|-
|{{flagicon|Saudi Arabia}} [[2034 FIFA World Cup|2034]]
|-
!Total
!
!{{Tooltip|0/8|Number of tournaments qualified for}}
!
!
!
!
!
!
!28
!5
!5
!18
!25
!72
|}

===CONCACAF Gold Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
! colspan=10|[[CONCACAF Championship]] & [[CONCACAF Gold Cup|Gold Cup]] record
!width=1% rowspan="31"|
! colspan=6|[[CONCACAF Gold Cup qualification|Qualification]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Position
!Pld
!W
!D*
!L
!GF
!GA
!Squad
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|SLV}} [[1963 CONCACAF Championship|1963]]
|colspan=9 rowspan=11|''Did not enter''
|colspan=6 rowspan=11|''Did not enter''
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|GUA}} [[1965 CONCACAF Championship|1965]]
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|HON|1949}} [[1967 CONCACAF Championship|1967]]
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|CRC}} [[1969 CONCACAF Championship|1969]]
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|TRI}} [[1971 CONCACAF Championship|1971]]
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|Haiti|1964}} [[1973 CONCACAF Championship|1973]]
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|MEX}} [[1977 CONCACAF Championship|1977]]
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|HON|1949}} [[1981 CONCACAF Championship|1981]]
|-
| align="center" |[[1985 CONCACAF Championship|1985]]
|-
| align="center" |[[1989 CONCACAF Championship|1989]]
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|United States}} [[1991 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1991]]
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|United States}}{{flagicon|Mexico}} [[1993 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1993]]
|colspan=9 rowspan=5|''Did not qualify''
|3
|0
|0
|3
|5
|8
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|United States}} [[1996 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1996]]
|2
|0
|1
|1
|0
|1
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|United States}} [[1998 CONCACAF Gold Cup|1998]]
|5
|3
|0
|2
|13
|10
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|United States}} [[2000 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2000]]
|6
|2
|1
|3
|9
|18
|-
| align="center"| {{flagicon|United States}} [[2002 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2002]]
|3
|0
|0
|3
|3
|8
|-
| align="center"| {{flagicon|United States}}{{flagicon|Mexico}} [[2003 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2003]]
|colspan=9|''Withdrew''
|colspan=6|''Withdrew''
|-
| align="center"| {{flagicon|United States}} [[2005 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2005]]
|colspan=9 rowspan=11|''Did not qualify''
|3
|0
|0
|3
|1
|16
|-
| align="center"| {{flagicon|United States}} [[2007 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2007]]
|3
|0
|1
|2
|0
|5
|-
| align="center"| {{flagicon|United States}} [[2009 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2009]]
|2
|0
|0
|2
|1
|6
|-
| align="center"| {{flagicon|United States}} [[2011 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2011]]
|5
|2
|1
|2
|13
|9
|-
| align="center"| {{flagicon|United States}} [[2013 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2013]]
|3
|1
|0
|2
|4
|5
|-
| align="center"| {{flagicon|United States}}{{flagicon|Canada}} [[2015 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2015]]
|3
|0
|1
|2
|1
|7
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|United States}} [[2017 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2017]]
|4
|1
|0
|3
|9
|10
|-
| align="center" |{{flagicon|United States}}{{flagicon|Costa Rica}}{{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[2019 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2019]]
|4
|2
|1
|1
|6
|5
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}} [[2021 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2021]]
|6
|1
|0
|5
|3
|14
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}}{{flagicon|Canada}} [[2023 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2023]]
|4
|0
|2
|2
|2
|5
|-
|{{flagicon|United States}}{{flagicon|Canada}} [[2025 CONCACAF Gold Cup|2025]]
|6
|1
|1
|4
|6
|18
|-
!Total
!0 titles
!0/28
!0
!0
!0
!0
!0
!0
!—
!62
!13
!9
!40
!76
!145
|}

===CONCACAF Nations League===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
! colspan="20" |[[CONCACAF Nations League]] record
|-
! colspan="10" |League
! rowspan="7" |
! colspan="9" |Finals
|-
!Season
!Division
!Group
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
! width="28" |{{Tooltip|P/R|Promotion/relegation at end of season}}
!'''Finals'''
!'''Result'''
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Games played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
!{{Tooltip|Squad|Finals Squad Only}}
|-
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League|2019–20]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2019–20 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group D|D]]
|6
|1
|0
|5
|3
|14
|{{fall}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2021 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2021]]
| colspan="8" rowspan="4" |''Ineligible''
|-
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League|2022–23]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2022–23 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group C|C]]
|4
|0
|2
|2
|2
|5
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2023 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2023]]
|-
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League|2023–24]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League C|C]]
|[[2023–24 CONCACAF Nations League C#Group C|C]]
|4
|3
|1
|0
|8
|2
|{{rise}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2024 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2024]]
|-
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League|2024–25]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League B|B]]
|[[2024–25 CONCACAF Nations League B#Group D|D]]
|6
|1
|1
|4
|6
|18
|{{same position}}
|{{flagicon|USA}} [[2025 CONCACAF Nations League Finals|2025]]
|-
!Total
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!20
!5
!4
!11
!19
!39
!'''—'''
!'''Total'''
!'''0 Titles'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
!'''—'''
|}

===Caribbean Cup===
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!colspan=11|[[Caribbean Cup]] record
|-
!Year
!Round
!Pld
!W
!D
!L
!GF
!GA
|-
|{{flagicon|Barbados}} [[1989 Caribbean Cup|1989]]
|rowspan=2 colspan=7|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[1990 Caribbean Cup|1990]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[1991 Caribbean Cup|1991]]
|colspan=7|''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[1992 Caribbean Cup|1992]]
|rowspan=2 colspan=7|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[1993 Caribbean Cup|1993]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[1994 Caribbean Cup|1994]]
| Group stage
| 3
| 0
| 1
| 2
| 1
| 11
|-
|{{flagicon|Cayman Islands}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[1995 Caribbean Cup|1995]]
|rowspan=3 colspan=7|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[1996 Caribbean Cup|1996]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Antigua and Barbuda}} {{flagicon|Saint Kitts and Nevis}} [[1997 Caribbean Cup|1997]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} {{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[1998 Caribbean Cup|1998]]
| Group stage
| 3
| 0
| 0
| 3
| 2
| 15
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[1999 Caribbean Cup|1999]]
|rowspan=9 colspan=7|''Did not qualify''
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[2001 Caribbean Cup|2001]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Barbados}} [[2005 Caribbean Cup|2005]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Trinidad and Tobago}} [[2007 Caribbean Cup|2007]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[2008 Caribbean Championship|2008]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Martinique|snake}} [[2010 Caribbean Cup|2010]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Antigua and Barbuda}} [[2012 Caribbean Cup|2012]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Jamaica}} [[2014 Caribbean Cup|2014]]
|-
|{{flagicon|Martinique|snake}} [[2017 Caribbean Cup|2017]]
|-
!Total
!2/19
!6
!0
!1
!5
!3
!26
|}

==References==
{{reflist}}

==External links==
{{Dominica national football team}}
{{Football in Dominica}}
{{CONCACAF teams}}
{{National sports teams of Dominica}}

[[Category:Dominica national football team| ]]
[[Category:Caribbean national association football teams]]
